name_en: 💕【New】The circular interlocking double-G motif draws inspiration from the brand's heritage, adding elegance to leather accessories as always. This black leather card case brings the charm of the 1970s style to life. It is meticulously designed with multiple compartments for various uses.
name_cn:
💕【New】The circular interlocking double-G motif draws inspiration from the brand's heritage, adding elegance to leather accessories as always. This black leather card case brings the charm of the 1970s style to life. It is meticulously designed with multiple compartments for various uses.
Black leather
Taffeta lining
Enamel circular interlocking details
Interior: card slots, 1 coin pocket
Snap closure
Model: 818795
Open dimensions: 22cm (W) x 9cm (H); Closed dimensions: 11cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Weight: approx. 80g
Color: Black full leather/Original leather
Italian creation
